name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Central government scheme providing financial assistance to build or buy a pucca house for economically weaker sections, low income groups, and rural households.
eligibility: Families without a pucca house; income criteria vary by urban (PMAY-U) or rural (PMAY-G) component; priority to women, SC/ST, and differently-abled applicants.

name: Ayushman Bharat – Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Provides health insurance cover of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospital care, cashless and paperless at empanelled hospitals.
eligibility: Families identified as economically vulnerable under SECC 2011 database; check eligibility on the official portal using ration card or Aadhaar.

name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year, paid in three equal instalments directly into bank accounts, to help landholding farmer families with agricultural expenses.
eligibility: All landholding farmer families, subject to certain exclusions such as income-tax payees and institutional landholders.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Provides deposit-free LPG gas connections to women from poor households to replace unsafe cooking fuels like firewood and coal.
eligibility: Adult women from BPL/poor households without an existing LPG connection.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: A small-savings scheme for the education and marriage expenses of a girl child, offering a high, government-guaranteed interest rate.
eligibility: Parents/guardians can open an account for a girl child below 10 years of age, at a post office or authorised bank.

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: One-stop platform for students to apply for pre-matric, post-matric, and merit-based central and state government scholarships.
eligibility: Varies by scheme; generally students from economically weaker sections, minorities, SC/ST/OBC categories, or those with disabilities.

name: e-Shram Card
description: National database for unorganised sector workers, providing a portable e-Shram card that helps access social security schemes and benefits.
eligibility: Unorganised sector workers aged 16-59, such as migrant workers, gig workers, street vendors, construction workers, and domestic help.

name: Right to Information (RTI)
description: Lets any citizen formally request information from a public authority, promoting transparency and accountability in government functioning.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen can file an RTI application online or offline.

name: DigiLocker
description: Cloud-based platform to store, access, and share official documents like Aadhaar, PAN, driving licence, and academic certificates digitally.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen with a mobile number linked to Aadhaar can create a free account.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Provides universal access to banking with zero-balance savings accounts, a RuPay debit card, and accident insurance cover.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen without a bank account, especially in unbanked or underbanked households.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme offering financial support to farmers in case of crop failure due to natural calamities, pests, or diseases, at a low premium.
eligibility: Farmers, including sharecroppers and tenant farmers, growing notified crops in notified areas.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Guarantees a fixed monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after age 60, aimed mainly at workers in the unorganised sector.
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 with a savings bank account or post office account.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: Renewable one-year life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh at a very low annual premium in case of death of the insured, for any reason.
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-50 with a bank or post office account, via auto-debit consent.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accidental death and disability cover of up to ₹2 lakh at a very low annual premium.
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-70 with a bank or post office account, via auto-debit consent.

name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana
description: Provides collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small and micro enterprises for starting or expanding a business.
eligibility: Small business owners, shopkeepers, artisans, and micro-entrepreneurs seeking loans for income-generating activity.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Offers free, short-duration skill training and certification to help youth gain industry-relevant skills and improve employability.
eligibility: Indian youth, especially school/college dropouts and unemployed persons seeking skill certification.

name: Passport Seva
description: Official portal to apply for a new passport, renewal, or related services such as police clearance certificates, with appointment booking.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen; minors require parental documentation.

name: Parivahan Seva (Driving Licence & Vehicle Registration)
description: National portal for driving licence applications, learner's licence tests, vehicle registration, and related transport department services.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen meeting the minimum age and eligibility criteria for the specific service (e.g. 18+ for a permanent licence).

name: Ayushman Bharat Vay Vandana Card (Senior Citizens)
description: Extends the Ayushman Bharat health cover of ₹5 lakh per year specifically to all senior citizens aged 70 and above, regardless of income.
eligibility: All Indian citizens aged 70 years or above.

name: UMANG (Unified Mobile Application for New-age Governance)
description: Single mobile app providing access to hundreds of central and state government services, from utility bill payments to scheme applications.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen with a smartphone; some services require Aadhaar-linked mobile verification.
